subcodes.title: Bayan fi 'Ilm al-Jawamid wa'l-Mushtaqat
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath singled out His chosen ones by sublime glorification and hath unified His gates in the knowledge of supreme grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد تفرد اولیآئه بالمحامد العظمآء و توحد ابوابه فی علم الجوامد الکبریآء الذی قد نعت
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @symbolism
